base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of unused_beta_tile_palette1 — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Unused beta tile marked by sheet submitter — never appears in retail SMB levels but exists in cartridge ROM. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Unused beta tile marked by sheet submitter — never appears in retail SMB levels but exists in cartridge ROM; possibly underground pillar remnant
